title: The Children Are Nearly Safe
description: On pages 8–12, this part follows Smoker, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the children are nearly safe.
scene: The scene focuses on the children are nearly safe, with Smoker, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: But without any real power... Smoker

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now hurry up and end it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So you finally remembered your main- ERS.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You can hear me, can't you?

summary: The Children Are Nearly Safe. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
